pathAssistantSteps.info:
• Ensure all mandatory details are filled.
  • Upload initial Proof of Payment (POP).
  • Notify Finance team if needed.

• Finance checks POP against the banking system.
  • Verify deposit amount, payment mode, and reference numbers.
  • Update task status after review.
  • Move to Verified or mark NMI if clarification is needed.

• Sales Admin must collect the required missing documents.
  • Coordinate with the Sales Person or the customer if needed.
  • Upload updated POP or remarks.
  • Reassign back to Finance after completing updates.

• Add rejection reason in notes.
  • Notify Sales Admin and Sales Person.
  • If applicable, request the customer to resubmit the correct information.
  • EOI process ends unless a new POP is submitted.

• Finance generates the official receipt.
  • The system automatically emails the receipt to the client.
  • Mark EOI as complete.
  • Update any linked Lead/Opportunity if required.
